name: Celebi
description: This Pokémon came from the future by crossing over time. It is thought that so long as Celebi appears, a bright and shining future awaits.
originLore: Celebi slips between centuries carrying seeds of restored futures. Wherever it appears, blighted timelines begin to green again.

lore.celestialConcordance: Celebi's presence is an omen: if the sprite arrives, a brighter branch of history still exists.

quantumResonators.name: Time Travel
quantumResonators.description: Phases the host across temporal nodes without tearing space.

quantumResonators.name: Natural Cure
quantumResonators.description: Purges status corruption when it withdraws from conflict.
